title: Voxtral TTS: Mistral AI's Open-Weights Text-to-Speech for Voice Agents
excerpt: Mistral AI released Voxtral TTS, a lightweight open-weights text-to-speech model with 70ms latency, multilingual support, and instant voice adaptation for production voice agents.

title: SAM 3.1: Meta's Real-Time Video Detection and Tracking Revolution
excerpt: Meta's SAM 3.1 brings real-time video detection and tracking to production systems using multiplexing and global reasoning. A major leap for computer vision accessibility.

title: Gemini 3.1 Flash Live: Google DeepMind's Audio AI Breakthrough
excerpt: Google DeepMind's Gemini 3.1 Flash Live brings enhanced audio AI with natural voice interactions and improved reliability for production applications.

title: Claude 4.5 Sonnet: What Developers Need to Know in 2026
excerpt: A practical look at Claude 4.5 Sonnet capabilities, performance benchmarks, and how it compares to GPT-5 for real-world coding tasks.
